title: White-Mc
description: A White-focused minecraft texture designed for SMP's
body:
White-Mc Resource Pack 
A Minecraft texture pack that Adds A Ton Of New Textures To items Main Screen And UI's with this pack you can enjoy A White Pack Minecraft Experiance On Your SMP's 

## Features✨:

- A cool White background.
- White minecraft Title.
- White ingame ui for food and xp.
- White Server screen 
- White server list
- White end sky glow
- White sweep particals
- White mojang studios screen (with puzzle mod)
- Clear end sky
- Clear Watter
- Full crops notifi
- No eating paticals
- No explosion particals
- And More soon...
- Mods support like
[Modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) [VoiceChat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) [Apple skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) ...

![ui](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1433604245055082568/1508821674529652776/jt3qt84.png?ex=6a16ef2f&is=6a159daf&hm=4794ecd8fb4f9084e09fcbb57871b46954e004e73eba16f3c954ce6f45393765&)
  
you need [Apple skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) for the food bar to work
